skills_and_achievements: Financial planning, reporting, and analysis; GL, AR/AP, month/quarter/year-end close; bank and account reconciliations; budgeting, forecasting, treasury, cash flow; GST implementation and tax compliance/planning; consolidation and statutory reporting; audit liaison; systems: SAP FICO/BPC/COPA, Hyperion, AS/400, AccPac, iScala, CTOS, Polymath, HSBC online; Advanced Excel/VBA, Adobe; bilingual English/Bahasa; recognized for excellence in analysis, budgeting, and forecasting.
